nodes.name: RuntimeConfigPanel.tsx
nodes.summary: Runtime configuration panel component for managing proxy runtime settings including debug, logging, auto-update, proxy URL, routing strategy, and other live config toggles via the management API.

nodes.name: VisualConfigEditor.test.tsx
nodes.summary: Test suite for VisualConfigEditor component covering auto-update toggle, source branch selection, custom Docker image repo, and YAML load/write round-trip.

nodes.name: PayloadRuleEditors.tsx
nodes.summary: Editors for payload override rules and payload filter rules used in visual config. Provides dynamic form UI to manage model entries, params, and param value types.

nodes.name: types.ts
nodes.summary: Type definitions for visual config including PayloadRule, PayloadFilterRule, RoutingChannelGroupEntry, RoutingPathRouteEntry, VisualConfigValues, and helpers makeClientId and DEFAULT_VISUAL_VALUES.

nodes.name: useVisualConfig.ts
nodes.summary: React hook for managing visual config state with YAML serialization/deserialization. Handles parsing of nested proxy config structure into flat form state and back, including API keys, routing, payload rules, and filters.

nodes.name: VisualConfigEditor.tsx
nodes.summary: Main visual configuration editor form component with sections for basic settings, TLS, remote management, auth, logging, auto-update, routing channel groups, path routes, payload rules, and payload filters.

nodes.name: YamlCodeEditor.tsx
nodes.summary: Custom YAML code editor component with syntax highlighting, comment-aware tokenizer, search with result navigation, and forwardRef-based imperative API for cursor/selection control.

nodes.name: DashboardCards.test.ts
nodes.summary: Snapshot-style tests verifying dashboard card composition by reading source files and checking expected imports, formatting functions, dark mode classes, and component structure.

nodes.name: DashboardPage.tsx
nodes.summary: Main dashboard page with KPI cards (total requests, tokens, active keys, cost), throughput trend chart, and system monitor section. Polls for dashboard summary and system stats with auto-refresh.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export file re-exporting DashboardPage and dashboardRoute.

nodes.name: route.tsx
nodes.summary: Route definition for /dashboard with auth required, dashboard layout, and nav label.

nodes.name: SystemMonitorSection.tsx
nodes.summary: System monitoring UI section with health score ring, disk usage ring, CPU/memory gauges, network throughput rates, uptime, latency per channel, and active concurrency cards.

nodes.name: useSystemStats.ts
nodes.summary: React hook that connects to a WebSocket for live system stats with HTTP polling fallback. Provides SystemStats, ChannelLatency, and ConcurrencySnapshot types.

nodes.name: IdentityFingerprintPage.test.tsx
nodes.summary: Tests for IdentityFingerprintPage covering provider tabs (Codex, Claude, Gemini, Kimi), YAML config integration, and form interactions.

nodes.name: IdentityFingerprintPage.tsx
nodes.summary: Identity fingerprint configuration page with per-provider tabs (Codex, Claude, Gemini, Kimi). Supports editing user-agent, session mode, custom headers, and YAML config import/export.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export file re-exporting IdentityFingerprintPage and identityFingerprintRoute.

nodes.name: route.tsx
nodes.summary: Route definition for /identity-fingerprint with auth required, dashboard layout, and redirect from legacy path.

nodes.name: ImageGenerationPage.test.tsx
nodes.summary: Tests for ImageGenerationPage covering text-to-image, image-to-image, auth file selection, task polling, and UI state transitions.

nodes.name: ImageGenerationPageContent.tsx
nodes.summary: Image generation page content with text-to-image and image-to-image modes. Supports model selection, auth file binding, size/quality parameters, image upload, generation task polling, and API documentation with curl examples.

nodes.name: ImageGenerationPage.tsx
nodes.summary: Thin wrapper component that delegates rendering to ImageGenerationPageContent.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export file re-exporting ImageGenerationPage and imageGenerationRoute.

nodes.name: route.tsx
nodes.summary: Route definition for /image-generation with auth required and dashboard layout.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export file re-exporting LoginPage and loginRoute.

nodes.name: LoginPage.tsx
nodes.summary: Login page with API base URL, management key input with show/hide toggle, remember password, and redirect to dashboard on success. Handles auth restoring state and redirects authenticated users.

nodes.name: route.tsx
nodes.summary: Route definition for /login with no auth required and no layout wrapper.

nodes.name: RuntimeConfigPanel
nodes.summary: React component providing the runtime configuration panel toggles and text inputs for proxy settings like debug, logging, auto-update, proxy URL, retry count, and routing strategy.

nodes.name: PayloadRulesEditor
nodes.summary: Editor component for managing a list of PayloadRule objects with dynamic add/remove for models and params.

nodes.name: PayloadFilterRulesEditor
nodes.summary: Editor component for managing a list of PayloadFilterRule objects.

nodes.name: useVisualConfig
nodes.summary: React hook that manages visual config state, providing methods to load from YAML, serialize to YAML, and update individual fields. Handles all config sections including routing, payload rules, and API keys.

nodes.name: VisualConfigEditor
nodes.summary: React component rendering the full visual configuration editor with sections for basics, TLS, remote management, auth, logging, auto-update, routing, and payload rules.

nodes.name: YamlCodeEditor
nodes.summary: Forwarded-ref YAML code editor component with built-in syntax highlighting using custom tokenizer, search functionality, and cursor/selection management.

nodes.name: DashboardPage
nodes.summary: Main dashboard page component rendering KPI cards, throughput trend chart, and system monitor section with auto-refresh polling.

nodes.name: SystemMonitorSection
nodes.summary: React component displaying system health metrics including health score, disk usage, CPU/memory gauges, network throughput, latency, and concurrency.

nodes.name: useSystemStats
nodes.summary: React hook connecting to WebSocket for real-time system stats with HTTP polling fallback. Returns stats, connection status, and error state.

nodes.name: IdentityFingerprintPage
nodes.summary: React component for managing identity fingerprints across providers (Codex, Claude, Gemini, Kimi) with YAML integration.

nodes.name: ImageGenerationPage
nodes.summary: React component for OpenAI-compatible image generation testing with text-to-image and image-to-image modes, auth file selection, and task polling.

nodes.name: LoginPage
nodes.summary: React component providing the authentication login form with API base URL, management key, remember password, and redirect-to-dashboard flow.

nodes.name: VisualConfigValues
nodes.summary: Type defining all visual configuration value fields including host, port, TLS, remote management, auth, logging, auto-update, routing, and payload rules.

nodes.name: PayloadRule
nodes.summary: Type representing a payload override rule with model entries and parameter entries.

nodes.name: RoutingChannelGroupEntry
nodes.summary: Type representing a routing channel group with strategy, match mode, channels, tags, allowed models, and system flag.

nodes.name: SystemStats
nodes.summary: Interface defining system statistics fields including CPU, memory, disk, network, uptime, concurrency, and latency data.
